_meta.purpose: Guides-to-do backlog. The weekly scan replenishes it; the nightly job builds the top item whose status is 'queued'.
_meta.refreshCadence: weekly — re-scan SteamDB top sellers / most-played + recent & upcoming story-driven releases, eligibility-filter, and replenish
_meta.buildCadence: nightly 03:00 — build the highest-ranked item with status 'queued' (skip anything already in content/games)
_meta.eligibilityRule: Must have a guidable golden path (story/objective-driven). Excludes competitive/multiplayer, sandboxes, sims, and roguelites with no story spine. See docs/visualwalkthroughs-content-advisor.md.
_meta.holdRule: Brand-new / unreleased titles are 'hold' (low confidence) until reliable community walkthrough sources settle — typically a fortnight after launch. The picker skips 'hold'.
_meta.pickerNote: Cross-reference content/games/*.json before building so already-published titles are never re-queued.
